## Meeting Purpose

[Define the problem and scope for a new AI text editor.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=2294.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Core Problem:** The current workflow is a "black box" where editors use Google Docs, making client feedback inaccessible to the system. This breaks the AI learning loop and prevents scaling.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=4057.0)
  - [**The Bottleneck:** This process fails during the handoff from the 8-week "sprint" (led by a "hero editor") to the 12-month "ongoing" phase (led by a new editor). The new editor lacks the undocumented context, causing quality drops, slow turnaround, and client churn.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=4186.0)
  - [**The Solution:** A hybrid feedback tool in the platform will capture client comments (specific errors) and structured feedback (higher-level issues) to create a "digital twin" of the client's preferences.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=7531.0)
  - [**The Scope:** The January project is tightly focused on building this feedback loop and a "Simulated Client Review" tool for editors. It explicitly excludes client sign-off and advanced quality calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=9607.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: A Bottleneck in the Content Workflow

  - [**Current State:** GrowthX delivers high-quality content at a 10x cost advantage ($0.10–$0.20/word vs. $1.50/word) by combining Marcel's strategic process with AI workflows.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
  - [**The Bottleneck:** The editor team (60 people) is a "black box." Editors work in Google Docs, making their interventions and client feedback invisible to the system.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=4057.0)
  - [**The Critical Failure Point: The Handoff**](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=4186.0)
      - [**Sprint Phase (Weeks 1–8):** A "hero editor" (e.g., Ada) manages the client. They internalize feedback from calls and Google Doc comments, making undocumented, heroic edits.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=4057.0)
      - [**Ongoing Phase (12-Month Contract):** A new editor takes over. Lacking the undocumented context, they struggle to meet the client's quality bar.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=4186.0)
      - [**Result:** This leads to slow turnaround (e.g., 5 hours/article vs. 30 mins), client churn, and an inability to scale capacity.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=4282.0)

### The Solution: A Hybrid Feedback Tool

  - [**Goal:** Capture client feedback directly in the platform to make it a structured, reproducible data signal for the AI.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=4944.0)
  - [**Hybrid Approach:** The tool will combine two feedback methods:](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=7531.0)
    1.  [**In-line Comments:** For specific, localized errors (e.g., "replace 'help' with 'support'").](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=7572.0)
    2.  [**Structured Feedback:** A quiz-like section for higher-level issues (e.g., "Did we use the right sources?").](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=7583.0)
  - [**Rationale:** This captures two distinct types of failure:](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=7344.0)
      - [**Comments → Application Failure:** The system failed to apply correct inputs.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=7344.0)
      - [**Structured Feedback → Input Failure:** The initial inputs (brief, research) were wrong.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=7357.0)
  - [**Client Framing:** Position the tool as building a "digital twin" of the client's experts. This frames the feedback process as an investment in a valuable, proprietary asset.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=10566.0)

### The Scope: January Project & Future Work

  - [**January Project Scope:**](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=9607.0)
      - [**Primary Goal:** Ensure new editors do not repeat mistakes already flagged by the client.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=10781.0)
      - [**Core Feature:** The hybrid feedback tool for clients.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=7531.0)
      - [**Internal Tool:** A "Simulated Client Review" for editors to self-check drafts against the "digital twin" before client review.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=9130.0)
      - [**Monitoring:** Track the number of simulations run per editor to ensure process adherence.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=9823.0)
  - [**Out-of-Scope for January:**](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=9607.0)
      - [**Client Sign-off:** A formal approval step is a separate project.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=9445.0)
      - [**Advanced Quality Calibration:** The "quiz-like" calibration guide shown for Engine.com is a separate, future initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=6875.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=10868.0)
      - [Share the session recording and whiteboard with the development team.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=10868.0)
      - [Focus the January project on the defined scope: the hybrid feedback tool and the "Simulated Client Review."](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=9607.0)
      - [Defer work on client sign-off and advanced calibration to separate projects.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=9607.0)
  - [**Ryan Singer:**](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=10868.0)
      - [Send the whiteboard diagram to the GrowthX team.](https://fathom.video/share/HbatPr682Usc3yUfScqhLsD4zukgjXns?tab=summary&timestamp=10868.0)
